summary: Iteration 4 - Complete Playlist System Testing. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. Full playlist flow verified: create playlist, add items from movie/TV detail pages, view playlist cards with poster previews, view playlist detail with items, remove items, discover public playlists.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/playlists creates playlist (auth required) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/playlists with is_public=true creates public playlist - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/playlists returns user playlists with items - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/playlists/{id} returns specific playlist - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/playlists/{id} deletes playlist - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/playlists/{id}/items adds movie item - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/playlists/{id}/items adds TV item - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/playlists/{id}/items/{content_id} removes item - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/playlists/public/discover returns public playlists - PASSED
Backend: Auth required for create/get/add/delete playlist operations - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/playlists/{invalid_id} returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: Health endpoint /api/health works - PASSED
Backend: Login with admin credentials works - PASSED
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Login flow works with admin@wavewatch.com - PASSED

Frontend: Create playlist form has name input (data-testid='playlist-name-input') - PASSED
Frontend: Create playlist form has description input (data-testid='playlist-desc-input') - PASSED
Frontend: Create playlist form has public checkbox (data-testid='playlist-public-checkbox') - PASSED
Frontend: Create playlist form has submit button (data-testid='submit-playlist-btn') - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: All playlist CRUD operations work correctly with proper auth checks
AddToPlaylistButton component properly handles auth state and shows error toast when not logged in
Playlist dropdown shows checkmarks for items already in playlist (toggle add/remove)
PlaylistsPage shows visual cards with poster grid preview (up to 4 posters)
PlaylistDetailPage shows items grid with remove buttons for owner
DiscoverPlaylistsPage shows public playlists with poster previews and creator info
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
French localization is consistent throughout the playlist system
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test playlist 'Ma Playlist Test' during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 complete - Playlist system fully tested. All components working: AddToPlaylistButton (dropdown with create inline), PlaylistsPage (visual cards with poster grid), PlaylistDetailPage (items grid with remove), DiscoverPlaylistsPage (public playlists). Backend playlist APIs all working with proper auth. No issues found.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all playlist operations use real MongoDB backend
